projects.title: OpenMOSS / MOSS-TTS-Nano
projects.description: MOSS-TTS-Nano is an open-source multilingual tiny speech generation model from MOSI.AI and the OpenMOSS team. With only 0.1B parameters, it is designed for realtime speech generation, can run directly on CPU without a GPU, and keeps the deployment stack simple enough for local demos, web serving, and lightweight product integration.

projects.usage: 适合有特定需求的开发者，可以灵活使用
